problem_solved: Homecare agencies juggle multiple disconnected systems for care planning, rostering, and finance. Birdie provides a unified platform that eliminates duplicate data entry, reduces errors, and enables data-driven care decisions.
who_buys: Homecare agencies, domiciliary care providers, home care businesses
key_features: Unified care management platform with care plans, eMAR, and visit notes in single client profiles
Seamless rostering with automatic schedule generation and travel time optimization
Real-time dashboards and predictive CQC benchmarking (Q-Score)
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - unified homecare platform model can be adapted to other markets. Strong focus on regulatory compliance (CQC) and care outcomes measurement. Platform approach (care, rostering, finance, compliance) is scalable.

problem_solved: Home care providers struggle with scattered care records, inefficient scheduling, and compliance documentation. PASS brings care planning, scheduling, eMAR, audits, and finance into one joined-up platform.
who_buys: Home care agencies, domiciliary care providers, supported living providers
key_features: Digital care planning with 120+ templates and AI-powered risk detection (PASSgenius)
Integrated rostering with drag-and-drop rotas and real-time visit tracking
NHS-assured and ISO 27001 certified with full DSCR compliance
why_varden_should_care: NHS-assured platform with AI features for care note analysis. Proven to help 37% more providers achieve outstanding CQC ratings. Strong regulatory alignment makes it replicable in regulated markets.

problem_solved: Local authorities and care providers need visibility and control over domiciliary care delivery. CM provides real-time monitoring, scheduling optimization, and contract management for both in-house and third-party care services.
who_buys: Local authorities, councils, care providers, NHS trusts, community health services
key_features: MaxCare optimization engine using custom algorithms for efficient rostering and route planning
Real-time mobile monitoring (CM mobile) with visit tracking and lone worker safety
Integrated invoicing, payroll, and business intelligence reporting
why_varden_should_care: Strong focus on local authority market - addresses both provider and commissioner needs. Proven efficiency savings (£413k in year one at Pembrokeshire Council). MaxCare optimization algorithms are differentiated and replicable.

problem_solved: Care providers face inefficient legacy software that's difficult to use and creates administrative burden. Log my Care provides intuitive, modern care management software that reduces training time and improves compliance.
who_buys: Domiciliary care agencies, supported living providers, nursing homes
key_features: Intuitive care recording app with offline mode and real-time updates
Integrated rostering add-on with skill-based matching and shift optimization
PBS (Positive Behaviour Support) planning with linked behavioral tracking
why_varden_should_care: Freemium model enables rapid market penetration. Strong UX focus reduces training costs. PBS features address specialized care needs. Platform can be replicated with local regulatory adaptations.

problem_solved: Larger care organizations managing multiple locations and care types need unified visibility and control. Care Business Management balances high-quality care delivery with financial health across complex organizations.
who_buys: Large care providers, independent care groups, local authorities, housing associations
key_features: Unified management for residential, domiciliary, supported living, and complex care
Integrated rostering, payroll, and invoicing across multiple locations
Scalable architecture supporting mergers, acquisitions, and organic growth
why_varden_should_care: Enterprise-grade solution for multi-site providers. Strong focus on financial health alongside care quality. Scalability features support M&A activity - common in care markets globally.

problem_solved: Care providers need compliant, easy-to-use care planning and rostering software. Carebeans offers NHS-assured digital care records with integrated compliance, training, and policy management through QCS partnership.
who_buys: Domiciliary care agencies, care homes, supported living providers
key_features: NHS-assured digital care records with PRSB partnership
Integrated care planning, rostering, and domiciliary care in one solution
24/7 support with real-time status updates and care timeline tracking
why_varden_should_care: NHS-assured with PRSB standards compliance. Now integrated with QCS for policies, audits, and training - creating comprehensive compliance ecosystem. All-in-one approach reduces integration complexity.
